ability.en: If the Demon kills the King, you learn which player is the Demon. [+the King]
ability.es: Si el Demonio mata al Rey, tú aprendes qué jugador es el Demonio. [+el Rey]
ability.sv: Om Demonen dödar Kungen får du veta vem som är Demonen. [+Kungen]
ability.cn: 如果恶魔杀死了国王，你会得知哪名玩家是恶魔。[+国王]

flavor.en: I saw it, I did. I was in the pews, tidying the hymn books, when a dreadful tune started from the pipe organ. The organist had a long cloak, and long fingers on the keys. And a hat that looked… just like… yours.
flavor.es: Yo lo vi, sí lo vi. Estaba en los bancos, ordenando los himnarios, cuando una melodía espantosa empezó a sonar en el órgano. El organista tenía una capa larga, y sus largos dedos estaban en las teclas. Y ese sombrero que se veía…justo como…el tuyo.
flavor.sv: Jag såg det. Jag höll på att ställa i ordning psalmböckerna när jag hörde en hemsk melodi från orgeln. Organisten hade en lång mantel, och långa fingrar på tangenterna. Och en hatt som såg ut… precis som… din.
flavor.cn: 我看到了，真的。我那会儿正在长椅上整理赞美诗册，突然一首可怕的管风琴曲子在我耳边响起。那风琴手披着一件长斗篷，他修长的手指搭在琴键上。他有一顶帽子……就像是……你现在戴着的这顶。

other_nights.en: If the Demon killed the King, point to the Demon player.
other_nights.es: Si el Demonio mató al Rey, apunta al jugador que es el Demonio.
other_nights.sv: Om Demonen dödade Kungen så peka på Demonen.
other_nights.zh: 如果恶魔杀死了国王，指向一名恶魔玩家。

how_to_run.cn:
在进行游戏设置，将角色标记放进盲抽袋之前，如果国王不在即将要放入盲抽袋的这些角色之中，那么移除一个镇民角色标记，并加入国王。
除首个夜晚之外的每个夜晚，如果恶魔杀死了国王，在让恶魔重新入睡后唤醒唱诗男孩。对他指向一名恶魔玩家。然后让唱诗男孩重新入睡。
how_to_run.en:
While setting up the game, before putting character tokens in the bag, if the King is not already in play, remove a Townsfolk character token and add the King character token.
Each night except the first, if the Demon kills the King, put the Demon to sleep then wake the Choirboy. Point to the Demon player then put the Choirboy to sleep.

cn: 小恶魔攻击了共情者，共情者死亡。下一个夜晚，小恶魔攻击了被僧侣保护的国王，国王没有死亡。再下一个夜晚，小恶魔攻击了国王，此时僧侣没有保护国王，国王死亡。唱诗男孩被说书人唤醒，并得知了一名恶魔玩家。
沙巴洛斯杀死了国王。醉酒的唱诗男孩被唤醒，并得知了角色为食人族的玩家是恶魔。
en: The Imp attacks the Empath. The Empath dies. The next night, the Imp attacks the King, who is protected by the Monk. The King lives. The next night, the Imp attacks the King, who is no longer protected by the Monk. The King dies. The Choirboy is woken by the Storyteller and learns which player is the Imp.
The Shabaloth kills the King. The drunk Choirboy wakes and wrongly learns that the General is the Demon.

cn: 唱诗男孩是恶魔的隐患，不知道你是否在场会让恶魔对待国王时谨慎行事。恶魔会变得进退两难，如果让国王活得过久，那么可能会令他们在关键时刻获得重要信息来影响游戏胜负，（反之，你会直接得知恶魔）。尽可能活下去来保持对恶魔的持续压力。
即使你死了，也不要暴露角色，你的存活就是对恶魔的一种威胁。你可以将你的角色信息带入坟墓。如果你的角色被其他角色知晓了，比如送葬者或是筑梦师，可以尝试和他们沟通让他们隐瞒你的角色。一个不知道存活与否的唱诗男孩对于恶魔的威胁程度和一个存活的唱诗男孩一样大。
如果国王公开现身，尽量谨慎地与之沟通。当一名玩家过于明显地寻找国王时，也等同于间接向邪恶阵营传递自己就是唱诗男孩的信号，你可以尝试寻找另一名值得信任的玩家，让他们代表你与国王进行沟通，即使他们不告诉国王你是谁，让国王得知唱诗男孩在场也已足够，这样会让他们更安全。
即使没有人承认自己是国王，你也要清楚地明白你在场等于国王在场，他们因为某种原因不愿暴露自己。在这个层面上，只有你和恶魔能确定国王在场，但恶魔还有知道国王是谁的优势，并且可能困惑于他们为什么不暴露自己。
你可以尝试和一名值得信任的玩家互相交换角色，让他们去宣称自己是唱诗男孩，如果恶魔杀死了假冒的唱诗男孩然后再自信地杀死国王，你就可以轻易得知恶魔。当然，如果表现得过于明显，恶魔也许不会相信。无论如何，这份犹豫能帮助国王存活。
en: The Choirboy is an ambush for the Demon. Not knowing whether you’re in the game or not is going to make the Demon act much more cautiously around the King. The Demon however has a dilemma, if they let the King stay alive for too long, then they are going to get really good information at a crucial moment in the game. Try to survive as long as you can to keep the pressure on the Demon.

If you die, don’t reveal this publicly, because just the threat of you being alive can be enough. You can take your secret with you to the grave. If there are characters like the Undertaker or Dreamer that learn who you are, it can be good to chat with them and get them to lie about your character. Remember the threat of a living Choirboy is almost as good as an alive Choirboy.

If the King reveals themselves, try to visit them discreetly when you can. If you’re too obvious in trying to seek out the King, this might signal to the Demon that you’re the Choirboy.  Maybe find a player you trust, and have them speak to the King on your behalf. Even if they don't reveal who you are to the King, you're letting them know that a Choirboy is in play, and this might let them act more safely.

If no one comes out as the King, you know that there should still be one in play. For some reason they’re not coming out. At this point, only you and the Demon knows for certain that there is a King in play, but the Demon has the advantage of knowing who they are, and might be quite confused about why they’re not coming out.

Character swap with another player and let them claim to be the Choirboy. If the Demon kills the fake Choirboy and then kills the King, you learn who the Demon is. Of course, if the other player is too obvious with their claim, the Demon might not believe them. However, the uncertainty it creates might help keep the King alive anyway.
